law: To run the sample code project in Xcode, make sure to use macOS 10.15.5 or later and Xcode 11.5 or later.
For the driver to load, System Integrity Protection (SIP) must be off.
The test device should be unsupported under macOS; otherwise, an existing driver will take precedence, recognize the device, and preempt this sample driver.

The sample driver requires the following command to find criteria that matches the keys in the Info.plist file for a selected USB device plugged into a Mac: WIth the device’s parmeters identified and placed in the Info.plist file, the driver loads and intializes the device upon insertion.
